svg.title: SOCVision AI – High-Level Architecture
svg.desc: Five-tier architecture: external threat sources, ingestion layer, SIEM/detection layer, AI and automation layer, and response/notification layer, connected by data flow arrows.

g.text: Wazuh Agent → Kafka/Logstash → CEF/JSON normaliser → Splunk HEC
PostgreSQL · Redis · Splunk Index · Wazuh Index
Persistent state · Session cache · Raw logs · Alert history

svg.text: Production-grade Security Operations Centre Automation Platform
